SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-27-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JAMES BELCHER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROBINSON HERNANDEZ MEJARES IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELCHER, JAMES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MEJARES, ROBINSON HERNANDEZ PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
